social.tagline: The 1st Egyptian Social Media Platform Based on AI

profile.notFoundMessage: The user you're looking for doesn't exist.
profile.usernameHint: Your unique identifier. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.

post.noPostsMessage: Start following people to see their posts!

comment.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!

search.noResults: No results found. Try a different search term.
search.trendingMessage: Trending topics will appear here. Start searching to discover users and posts!

settings.title: Settings
settings.isPrivateHint: Only approved followers can see your posts

auth.createProfile: Create your profile to start connecting with others and sharing your thoughts.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: You need to be logged in to do this.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

verification.addPhoneDesc: Verify your phone number to secure your account
verification.otpSentDesc: Check your phone for the verification code
verification.enterOTPDesc: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
verification.phoneVerifiedDesc: Your phone number has been successfully verified
verification.kycDesc: Verify your identity to unlock all platform features and build trust with the community.
verification.selfieDesc: Hold your ID document next to your face
verification.req1: At least one government-issued ID (Passport, National ID, or Driver's License)
verification.req2: A clear selfie holding your ID document
verification.req3: All documents must be valid and not expired
verification.documentUploadedDesc: Your document has been uploaded successfully
verification.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 16MB
verification.missingDocuments: Please upload at least one ID document and a selfie
verification.kycSubmittedDesc: Your identity verification is under review. We'll notify you once it's approved.
verification.kycPendingDesc: Your identity verification is under review. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
verification.kycApprovedDesc: Your identity has been successfully verified. You now have full access to all platform features.
verification.kycRejectedDesc: Please review the reason below and resubmit your documents.
verification.privacyNote: Your documents are encrypted and stored securely. We never share your personal information.
verification.kycReviewDesc: Review and approve identity verification submissions
verification.noPendingKYCDesc: All KYC submissions have been reviewed
verification.rejectKYCDesc: Please provide a reason for rejection. This will be shown to the user.
verification.rejectionReasonPlaceholder: e.g., Document is blurry, ID has expired, selfie doesn't match ID...
verification.reviewSuccessDesc: The KYC submission has been reviewed successfully
